name: code-quality
description: Code-Quality + Git-Disziplinen für Python/SQL/Git-Projekte. 16 Skills für Code-Review (Chunk-Dispatch, Findings-als-RED-Tests), Git-Hygiene (Commit-Honesty, Cross-Repo-State-Inspection, Bypass-Audit), Code-Patterns (Lazy-Module-Getattr, Subprocess-SSH-Arg-Quoting). Sprach-agnostisch, framework-agnostisch.
